Class CombinedVisitorAdapter

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.visitors.CombinedVisitorAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApi20Visitor, AsyncApi21Visitor, AsyncApi22Visitor, AsyncApi23Visitor, AsyncApi24Visitor, AsyncApi25Visitor, AsyncApi26Visitor, AsyncApi2xVisitor, AsyncApi30Visitor, AsyncApi31Visitor, AsyncApi3xVisitor, AsyncApiVisitor, JSDraft4Visitor, JSDraft6Visitor, JSDraft7Visitor, JSDraftVisitor, JS201909Visitor, JS202012Visitor, JSModernVisitor, JsonSchemaVisitor, OpenApi20Visitor, OpenApi30Visitor, OpenApi31Visitor, OpenApi32Visitor, OpenApi3xVisitor, OpenApiVisitor, OpenRpc13Visitor, OpenRpc14Visitor, OpenRpc1xVisitor, Visitor
Direct Known Subclasses:
DefinitionDetectionVisitor, DeleteMediaTypeCommand.MediaTypeRemover, DeleteMediaTypeCommand.MediaTypeRestorer, ExternalDocsCreator, IsDefinitionParentVisitor, OperationFinder, PathItemFinder, ReferencedNodeImporter
public class CombinedVisitorAdapter extends Object implements OpenRpc14Visitor, JS202012Visitor, JSDraft7Visitor, JSDraft6Visitor, JSDraft4Visitor, OpenRpc13Visitor, OpenApi20Visitor, AsyncApi26Visitor, AsyncApi25Visitor, AsyncApi31Visitor, AsyncApi20Visitor, JS201909Visitor, AsyncApi24Visitor, AsyncApi30Visitor, OpenApi30Visitor, AsyncApi23Visitor, AsyncApi22Visitor, OpenApi32Visitor, AsyncApi21Visitor, OpenApi31Visitor
